message:
fix(clippy): resolve clippy lints in blocked command and tests

- Fix branches_sharing_code by simplifying conditional logic
- Add #[allow(clippy::struct_excessive_bools)] to BlockedArgs
- Rename blocker_id/blocked_id to parent_id/child_id to avoid similar_names lint
- Run cargo fmt on e2e_wrap.rs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
